title: thymus cephalotos var. membranaceus
intro: Thymus cephalotos var. membranaceus, also known as the Mountain Thyme, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. It is native to the mountainous regions of Europe and has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Mountain Thyme include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and aid in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Mountain Thyme can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
